COMMODITY_DESCRIPTION: Science Instruction Equipment (For Classroom or La
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: ANSC - Melissa Rios 512-974-3865    One of the many programs that makes the Austin Nature & Science Center (ANSC) unique is our Astronomy program. By utilizing an inflatable dome and projector, we can simulate the night sky to teach about constellations and other planetary phenomena. These programs are offered to the public and are also a very popular option for teachers when scheduling field trips. Since our planetarium is portable, we can take it offsite to schools that cannot travel to ANSC. Our current planetarium dome is aging and has had to be patched up over the years. Our projector is outdated and now overheats with prolonged use. Purchasing a new dome and projector from Digitalis will allow us to continue offering these valuable programs to school children and the public. ANSC staff is already trained on the Digitalis software. In addition, ordering our replacement projector from Digitalis will mean it is compatible with our current dome, which will not be decommissioned but rather become our travel dome once our new dome arrives.  This is a replacement for our current portable planetarium which has reached the end of its life span.    Total amount $44,595.00    Sourcing Number 143207
